---
title: Shiny Libraries
---

The Shiny Templates come pre-configured with the following Shiny libraries. Each is AOT-compatible and built with source generators for zero-reflection performance.

## App Essentials

| Library | Description |
|---|---|
| [MAUI Shell](/mauishell/) | Shell navigation with ViewModel lifecycle management, source-generated routes, and DI integration |
| [Jobs](/jobs/) | Periodic and one-shot background tasks that survive app restarts with platform-aware scheduling |
| [HTTP Transfers](/httptransfers/) | Resumable background file uploads and downloads with progress monitoring and Azure Blob Storage support |
| [Local Notifications](/notifications/) | Rich local notifications with channels, scheduling triggers, and platform-specific customization |
| [Push Notifications](/push/) | Native, Firebase, and Azure Notification Hub push providers with a unified delegate model |
| [Configuration](/configuration/) | JSON platform bundles, platform preferences, and remote configuration |
| [Data Sync](/datasync/) | Bidirectional JSON sync with outbox / inbox semantics over HTTP and platform-tier background transports |

## Device & Sensors

| Library | Description |
|---|---|
| [Bluetooth LE](/ble/) | Full BLE client with scanning, connection management, GATT services, and background operations |
| [BLE Hosting](/blehosting/) | Advertise your device as a BLE peripheral with custom GATT services |
| [OBD](/obd/) | On-board diagnostics over Bluetooth LE with extensible command support and custom transports |
| [GPS & Geofencing](/locations/gps) | Foreground and background location tracking with geofence monitoring |

## Platform Data

| Library | Description |
|---|---|
| [Music](/music/) | Query tracks, browse by genre/decade/playlist, and play music from the device library |
| [Health](/health/) | Cross-platform health data access for HealthKit (iOS) and Health Connect (Android) — 12 metrics including steps, heart rate, calories, sleep, and more |
| [Contact Store](/contactstore/) | Cross-platform device contact access with full CRUD, LINQ queries, and MAUI permission classes |

## Speech & AI

| Library | Description |
|---|---|
| [Speech (STT/TTS)](/speech/) | Speech-to-text, text-to-speech, audio source, and audio player — MAUI native APIs and Web Speech API in Blazor |
| [AI Conversation](/aiconversation/) | Centralized AI service with `IChatClient` abstraction, wake-word detection, optional message store, and configurable acknowledgement modes — auto-wires Shiny.Speech when enabled |

## Controls (MAUI & Blazor)

| Library | Description |
|---|---|
| [TableView](/controls/tableview/) | Settings-style TableView with 14 cell types, cascading styles, sections, and full MVVM support |
| [Scheduler](/controls/scheduler/) | Calendar, agenda timeline, and event list views with shared event provider and custom templates |
| [ChatView](/controls/chatview/) | Modern chat UI with message bubbles, typing indicators, per-participant colors/avatars, and input bar |
| [ImageEditor](/controls/imageeditor/) | Inline image editor with crop, rotate, freehand drawing, text annotations, undo/redo, and export |
| [FloatingPanel](/controls/floatingpanel/) | Draggable sheet overlay (bottom/top) with snap points, backdrop, and pan gestures — MAUI (uses [SheetView](/controls/sheetview/) on Blazor) |
| [Fab & FabMenu](/controls/fab/) | Material-style floating action button and expanding multi-action menu with staggered animations |
| [Mermaid Diagrams](/controls/mermaid-diagrams/) | Native Mermaid flowchart rendering using pure MAUI Graphics (or Blazor SVG) with Sugiyama layout and pan/zoom |
| [Markdown](/controls/markdown/) | Render and edit markdown with native controls — read-only viewer and full editor with toolbar |
| [Barcodes & QR Codes](/controls/barcodes/) | Pure-managed 1D/2D barcode and QR code renderer (ZXing.Net, no SkiaSharp) — MAUI and Blazor SVG/PNG output |
| [Desktop Controls](/controls/) | Shiny.Maui.Controls.Desktop — Tray Icon, VS-style window Docking, and Touch / Kiosk On-Screen Keyboard for Windows / macOS / MacCatalyst / Linux |
| [Kiosk Controls (Blazor)](/controls/) | Shiny.Blazor.Controls.Kiosk — Touch / Kiosk On-Screen Keyboard and Docking for WebAssembly |
| [ColorPicker](/controls/colorpicker/) | Full-featured color picker with spectrum view, hue bar, opacity slider, hex input, and popup button mode |
| [ImageViewer](/controls/imageviewer/) | Full-screen image overlay with pinch-to-zoom, pan, double-tap zoom, and animated transitions |
| [SecurityPin](/controls/securitypin/) | PIN entry with individually rendered cells, optional character masking, and full styling control |
| [PillView](/controls/pillview/) | Status badge/label control with 6 preset themes, custom colors, and WCAG-accessible contrast |

## Database

| Library | Description |
|---|---|
| [Document DB](/documentdb/) | Store and query .NET objects as JSON documents with full CRUD, LINQ querying, projections, aggregates, and transactions — 10 providers including SQLite, SQL Server, PostgreSQL, Cosmos DB, MongoDB, LiteDB, DuckDB, and browser IndexedDB |
| [Spatial](/spatial/) | Dependency-free spatial database using SQLite R*Tree indexing with custom geometry algorithms |

## Core & Infrastructure

| Library | Description |
|---|---|
| [Mediator](/mediator/) | Mediator pattern implementation with middleware, caching, offline support, HTTP endpoints, and AOT source generation |
| [Reflector](/reflector/) | Source-generated property access, JSON serialization, and assembly info generation |
| [Dependency Injection](/di/) | Attribute-driven, source-generated service registrations with category-based conditional registration |
| [Stores](/stores/) | Cross-platform key/value store abstraction with persistent service binding (`[Bind]` attribute pattern) |
| [Localization Generator](/localizegen/) | Strongly-typed localization classes generated from .resx files |
| [MAUI Hosting](/mauihost/) | Modular MAUI app configuration with `IMauiModule`, static service access, and platform lifecycle dispatch |
| [Web Hosting](/webhost/) | ASP.NET Core infrastructure modules for common server-side patterns |

## Aspire

| Library | Description |
|---|---|
| [Orleans](/aspire/orleans/) | Simplified Orleans hosting for Aspire with streamlined AppHost configuration and Silo setup |
| [Gluetun VPN](/aspire/gluetun/) | Gluetun VPN container as a first-class Aspire resource with Docker Compose publish support |
